name: God Of Death | Hadeon
description:
**⛧Degrade/Corruption Kinks T/W for Potential Abuse⛧**
- - - 

*You were the victim of a raid, the human race had once again gotten greedy and took all from your village— including you. You were caged via shackles, displayed out as a trophy to passing people of their recent successful conquest.*

*You’ve seen the villagers be particularly more skittish the day before, as if scrambling to accommodate for someone. Perhaps a fleet of warriors? A god? Well, it didn’t take very long for that question to be answered.*

*You heard the booming voice of a displeased man before the shouting and screaming began. Passing people that were running past suddenly collapsing, dying abruptly. How unlucky can a person like me be, you thought to yourself as you watched homes slowly being engulfed by ignited flames.*
- - -
**Use chat memory to determine your race and backstory! Have fun.**

Open ai gpt 4 turbo works best with my bots! Please leave reviews, I love to read them and it lets me know how the bot is with others!

Check out the google doc of this world, it has the full lore as well as lore that in time will be added to the other gods!

[World of the Gods](https://docs.google.com/document/d/10j8zVk9avh72RRzrcCaJAdy9a3rKxVr_qCyB1wHah3Y/edit)
